note.content: Next to a disc golf course , mucho kids when school is out
Nice outdoor seating, spacious inside seating
Met man retired for 16 years now in local government talked dunks
Gentleman warned me never to buy mail-order pants from china. He did and they smelled like fish. 3/16/26
One table and bar, across from Olivia’s Starbucks
Can have sunglare inside in afternoon, nice tables outside
Lots of space to talk, near a middle school?
Good meeting spot - lots of tables

place.title: Waverley Sq Dunks (42)
place.address: 52 Church St Belmont, MA 02478 United States

place.address: 350 Pleasant St Belmont, MA 02478 United States

place.title: 353 Trapelo Dunks (19)

note.content: 2 small tables on left not in pictures
Hard to park nearby during weekdays
Music can be loud, temperature can be warm, especially in winter, once had door open in winter
